MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT STEVENS TRANSPORT, INC'S MOTION TO STAY OR DISMISS ON THE GROUND OF INCONVENIENT FORUM. Appearances: Louis Benowitz of the Law Offices of Louis Benowitz (310.888.7771) appearing telephonically for plaintiff and responding party; David A. Wimmer of Swerdlow Florence Sanchez Swerdlow & Wimmer (310.288.3980 x8201) for defendant and moving party. Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: motion granted.
